overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a cozy medieval tavern common room decorated for winter holidays. The camera initially focuses on a large Christmas tree and seating area before panning right to reveal a spectral ghostly apparition near a roaring stone fireplace.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a cozy medieval tavern interior decorated for the holidays. A large Christmas tree stands to the left while patrons relax on leather sofas in the center. The room features high stone arches and a lit fireplace visible in the background, with warm mixed lighting creating an inviting atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right to reveal the fireplace area where a translucent blue ghostly apparition stands near the flames. The Christmas tree and central seating exit the frame as the stone fireplace becomes the focal point. A person stands by the fire while the spectral figure remains motionless, adding a supernatural element to the warm tavern atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cozy medieval tavern that shifts from a festive communal space to a supernatural encounter by the hearth. It begins with a view of a large Christmas tree and patrons relaxing on leather sofas beneath high stone arches, all bathed in warm, inviting light. As the camera pans right, the festive decorations and central seating gradually exit the frame, shifting the focus toward the background. The scene then opens up to reveal a roaring stone fireplace where a person stands beside a translucent blue ghostly apparition. This movement transforms the atmosphere from one of holiday comfort to a mysterious, spectral tableau as the motionless figure becomes the final focal point.
